metatags.title: MONOLITH PROJECT
metatags.description:
The Monolith Project creates intentional, community-focused events that highlight the power of music and togetherness.
We produce experiences ranging from golden-hour celebrations to immersive nighttime gatherings, each built with care and purpose.
Our work includes Chasing Sun(Sets), the Chasing Sun(Sets) Radio Show, and Untold Story — all part of a growing ecosystem centered on connection, culture, and sound.
